# Tone of Voice

<!-- Generated by /bootstrap. No writing samples provided — derived from questionnaire. -->

## Context

This is an internal tool for a small team of admins. There's no public-facing content. Tone applies to: in-portal text (labels, messages, errors), documentation, and agent communication.

## Voice

**Direct.** Say what it does. No fluff, no marketing language.
- ✅ "Upload members list"
- ❌ "Effortlessly manage your community members"

**Functional.** Labels and messages tell the user exactly what will happen.
- ✅ "This will delete 12 users from WordPress. Continue?"
- ❌ "Are you sure?"

**Calm.** Errors don't panic. They explain what went wrong and what to do next.
- ✅ "Could not connect to WordPress. Check your credentials in the settings."
- ❌ "Error 401: Unauthorized"

## What to Avoid

- Marketing speak or enthusiasm
- Vague labels ("Submit", "Go", "Process")
- Technical jargon exposed to the user without explanation
- Visual decoration — this is a utility, not a product
